Meta.titleDefault: SUMOME | Find amateur sumo clubs across Japan
Meta.description: SUMOME is a portal to discover amateur sumo clubs nationwide. Club profiles, photobooks, and sports events—all in one place. The next yokozuna starts here.
Meta.ogTitle: SUMOME | Find amateur sumo clubs across Japan
Meta.ogDescription: Discover amateur sumo clubs across Japan. Club info, photobooks, and events. The next yokozuna starts here.
Meta.twitterDescription: Find amateur sumo clubs across Japan. The next yokozuna starts here.

Footer.taglineSub: Carrying the spirit of sumo into the future.

JsonLd.orgDescription: A portal to discover amateur sumo clubs across Japan. Club info, photobooks, and events.

About.metaDescription: SUMOME connects kids and amateur sumo clubs across Japan. We support discipline, fitness, and friendship through sumo.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeAdmin: Welcome to the SUMOME admin. Here is an overview of site operations.
dashboard.welcomeOwner: Welcome to your club dashboard. Manage your listing and membership applications.
dashboard.ctaDescAdmin:
Use the menu on the left to manage content, review applicants, and post updates.
Respond to trial and membership requests and publish news.
dashboard.ctaDescOwner: Update your listing under “Edit club profile” and respond to applicants under “Applications”.

Admin.footer: © 2026 Sumo Club Management System. Powered by Next.js & Prisma.

AboutPage.heroSubtitleLine1: Weaving the future of sumo from here.
AboutPage.heroSubtitleLine2: Where tradition meets innovation—a new platform.
AboutPage.storyP1: SUMOME makes it easy to search amateur sumo clubs across Japan. Anyone can find a club that fits their goals—near home or work.
AboutPage.storyP2: Find the right place to take your first steps as a rikishi, or follow and support a club you love. Through sumo, Japan’s traditional sport, we help people build new connections.
AboutPage.ctaBody: Listed clubs can showcase their team to reach fans and sponsors. We also send a free monthly photobook magazine to registered clubs.

Home.introBody:
SUMOME is a next-generation platform that amplifies the appeal of sumo—Japan’s national sport—through technology.

We connect community-based clubs with everyone who loves sumo and serve as a bridge between tradition and innovation to protect the dohyō of the future.
Home.serviceSearchDesc:
Find clubs across Japan
by region
Home.serviceConnectDesc:
Book a visit or trial—
take the first step
Home.serviceRecordDesc:
Turn practice and events
into a beautiful photobook
Home.managerLead:
SUMOME connects sumo clubs across Japan

with the rikishi of tomorrow.



All listing and usage fees are free.

Register in minutes and share

what makes your club special worldwide.
Home.benefit1Desc: A dedicated page for your activities and atmosphere. Add photos and video so your club’s personality comes through.
Home.benefit2Desc: Receive visit and trial requests directly on the site—less phone tag and easier management.
Home.benefit3Desc: As a perk, we send a high-quality magazine-style photobook of your activities—free—so memories live on in print.

ActivitiesPage.metaDescription: Reports from sumo events SUMOME hosts or joins. Tournament info and event coverage for amateur sumo.
ActivitiesPage.heroSubtitle: Highlights from events SUMOME hosts or takes part in.

PartnersPage.metaDescription: List your amateur sumo club on SUMOME for free. Reach new members, manage your page, and join Japan’s leading amateur sumo club platform.
PartnersPage.heroLine1: SUMOME is one of Japan’s largest amateur sumo club search platforms.
PartnersPage.heroLine2: Share what makes your club special and connect with new members and fans.
PartnersPage.heroLine3Before: Listing and management tools are completely
PartnersPage.heroNote: Listing is subject to review. Apply in as little as 3 minutes.
PartnersPage.featuresSubtitle: Features designed to reduce admin work and maximize results.
PartnersPage.f1Desc: Users here already care about sumo—so you are more likely to turn visits into memberships than on generic social media or a standalone site alone.
PartnersPage.f2Desc: No web skills required. Create and refresh an attractive club page and recruitment info as easily as writing a blog post.
PartnersPage.f3Desc: Official SUMOME certification helps parents and newcomers choose your club with confidence.
PartnersPage.stepsSubtitle: Your club page goes live in three simple steps.
PartnersPage.step1Desc: Enter your email and basic details to create a free administrator account.
PartnersPage.step2Desc: Add photos, practice schedules, coaching policies, and more using our dedicated forms.
PartnersPage.step3Desc: After a quick check by our team, your listing goes live on the site.
PartnersPage.bottomLine1: There are no setup or monthly fees.
PartnersPage.bottomLine2: Ready to share your dojo with fans across Japan?

ManagerLogin.helpP2: If you forgot your password, use “Forgot password?” and enter your email, club name, and representative name to reset it.
ManagerLogin.helpP3: If you don’t have an account yet, create one from the registration page.

ManagerEntry.metaDescription: Create a free SUMOME account and list your amateur sumo club. Reach new members in minutes.
ManagerEntry.errorNetwork: Registration failed. Check your network and settings, then try again.
ManagerEntry.msgCreatedLoginIssue: Your account was created. {detail} You can also sign in from the login page.
ManagerEntry.msgCreatedAutoLoginFailed: Your account was created, but automatic sign-in failed. Please sign in from the login page.
ManagerEntry.msgNavFailed: You are signed in, but navigation failed. Please reload the page.
ManagerEntry.heroLine1: Build the future of sumo with SUMOME.
ManagerEntry.heroLine2: Registration is free and takes just a few minutes.
ManagerEntry.benefit1Desc: No web skills needed. From your phone, create a clear recruitment page that is easier to find on Google.
ManagerEntry.benefit2Desc: Fewer phone and email back-and-forths. Trial requests and questions are organized so nothing slips through.
ManagerEntry.benefit3Title: Outreach that grows your fan base
ManagerEntry.benefit3Desc: Share daily practice and tournament energy nationwide with less effort—stronger ties with alumni and supporters.
ManagerEntry.formSubtitle: Enter the details below to start registering your club.
ManagerEntry.consentLine: By registering, you agree to the <terms>Terms of use</terms> and <privacy>Privacy policy</privacy>.

PrivacyPage.metaDescription: How SUMOME collects, uses, and protects personal information when you use our services.
PrivacyPage.intro: The SUMOME office (“we”) sets forth this Privacy Policy (“Policy”) regarding the handling of users’ personal information in the services (“Services”) provided on this website.
PrivacyPage.s1Body: “Personal information” means personal information as defined under the Act on the Protection of Personal Information of Japan: information about a living individual that can identify a specific individual by name, date of birth, address, telephone number, contact information, or other descriptions contained in the information.
PrivacyPage.s2Intro: We may collect the following information when you register for the Services:
PrivacyPage.s3Intro: We collect and use personal information for the following purposes:
s3Items: To provide and operate the Services
To respond to inquiries from users (including identity verification)
To send necessary communications such as maintenance and important notices
To identify users who violate the Terms or attempt to use the Services for wrongful purposes, and to refuse such use
PrivacyPage.s4Body: We will not provide personal information to third parties without your prior consent, except where permitted by the Act on the Protection of Personal Information or other laws and regulations.
PrivacyPage.s5Intro: For inquiries regarding this Policy, please use the contact form linked below.

TermsPage.metaDescription: Terms and conditions for using SUMOME’s website and services. Please read before registration or use.
TermsPage.intro: These Terms of Use (“Terms”) set forth the conditions for using the services (“Services”) provided by the SUMOME office (“we”) on this website. Registered users (“you”) shall use the Services in accordance with these Terms.
s1Items: These Terms apply to all relationships between you and us regarding use of the Services.
In addition to these Terms, we may establish rules for use of the Services (“Additional Terms”). Such Additional Terms shall constitute part of these Terms regardless of their names.
TermsPage.s2p1: To use the Services, a prospective user who agrees to these Terms shall apply for registration in the manner we specify, and registration is completed when we approve the application.
TermsPage.s2p2: We may refuse registration if we determine that an applicant falls under any of the following, and we are not obligated to disclose the reason:
s2warnings: The applicant submitted false information when applying for registration
The application is from someone who has previously violated these Terms
TermsPage.s3intro: When using the Services, you must not engage in any of the following:
s3items: Acts that violate laws, regulations, or public order and morals
Acts that infringe intellectual property rights (copyright, trademark rights, etc.) of us, other users, or third parties
Acts that destroy or interfere with the functions of our servers or networks
Commercial use of information obtained through the Services without our consent
Use of the Services for wrongful purposes
TermsPage.s4p1: Except for our willful misconduct or gross negligence, we shall not be liable for any damages arising from or related to the Services.
TermsPage.s4p2: We shall not be liable for any transactions, communications, or disputes between you and other users or third parties in connection with the Services.

CompanyPage.metaDescription: Learn about the company operating SUMOME—services, mission, and office locations.
CompanyPage.headOfficeLines:
〒103-0016
4-9 Nihonbashi Koamicho, Chuo-ku, Tokyo
Keiwa Building 3F
CompanyPage.nagoyaOfficeLines:
〒451-0042
Square Office Meieki Kita 5F, 2-12-21-1 Nagano, Nishi-ku, Nagoya
CompanyPage.outlineBody:
Using our proprietary “photobook magazine” model, we help sponsors raise corporate value and strengthen sales, while giving people featured in the photos lasting keepsakes of their memories.

We also help the schools, welfare facilities, and other organizations those subjects belong to promote their services and visibility—so everyone in the ecosystem benefits.
CompanyPage.cardSponsorTitle: Benefits for sponsors—sales support and employee perks
CompanyPage.cardSponsorBody:
Sponsor organizations already invest in many kinds of advertising, but traditional channels alone often hit a ceiling for sales support and awareness.
Sales teams opening new accounts often face a high wall before they can even get a meeting—and they strongly want a credible “door opener.”
Employees and their families can also appear in photos at sports days, family trips, and celebrations, so the program can double as a welfare perk.
CompanyPage.cardOrgTitle: Helping subjects’ organizations improve their image
CompanyPage.cardOrgBody: Schools, welfare providers, and similar organizations constantly struggle to hire and retain staff. They need effective tools to support recruiting and retention.
CompanyPage.cardMemoryBody: Because subjects can include photos they took themselves, the system makes it easy to keep memories—fun to use and simple to archive.
CompanyPage.schemeStep1: We use our in-house photo program.
CompanyPage.schemeStep3: We coordinate for free with individuals, families, and groups, explain the free photobook offer, and obtain consent to publish photos.
CompanyPage.schemeStep4: When the photobook is ready, each subject receives one copy for free.
CompanyPage.schemeStep4Note: Delivering the book in person—often by the sponsor’s sales rep—can create touchpoints with subjects and their organizations.
